event_title: Save Lives with Drones / IoT / Visual Recognition - Hands on Lab
title: Save Lives with Drones / IoT / Visual Recognition - Hands on Lab
description: 5:00-5:30pm Networking 5:30-6:00pm Dave Reich | The Observationist 6:00-7:00pm This hands on lab uses drone aerial images, Watson Studio and Watson Visual Recognition to survey flood damaged neighborhoods, identify homes with survivors on rooftops and detect rescue boats.
